MULTIPLAYERPOTIONS-SUMMON_POTION.title: Army in a Can
MULTIPLAYERPOTIONS-SUMMON_POTION.descrip: Lose 15% of your HP ([red]{Amount}[/red]), then each player Summons [green]{Summon}[/green].
MULTIPLAYERPOTIONS-RAGE_POTION.title: Rage Potion
MULTIPLAYERPOTIONS-RAGE_POTION.descripti: Whenever you play an Attack this turn, each player gains {Block} Block.
MULTIPLAYERPOTIONS-TEAM_ORBIT_POTION.des: Choose any player. For this turn, whenever they spend 4 Energy, [green]EVERY[/green] player gains 1 Energy.
